author: Benjamin TITEUX
message:
Updated extensions manager to handle CWE-22 & CWE-23 (#1643)

* Updated extensions manager to handle CWE-22 & CWE-23

* Fixed path on Linux and Mac

* Updated CI

* Update Xcode version to 26.1.1 in CI workflow

---------

Co-authored-by: Etienne Baudoux <ebaudoux@velersoftware.com>
